assertion_results.text: The review comment about transaction wrapping (id 30001) is classified as a code change request and triggers sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30001.md states 'Classification: code change request' and 'triggers sub-task creation (subtask-30001.md)'. The file subtask-30001.md exists with the corresponding sub-task content.

assertion_results.text: The review comment about adding an index (id 30002) is classified as a code change request (or upgraded suggestion) and triggers sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30002.md states 'Classification: code change request (upgraded from suggestion)' and 'triggers sub-task creation (subtask-30002.md)'. The file subtask-30002.md exists with the corresponding sub-task content.

assertion_results.text: The nit comment about context message (id 30003) is classified as nit and does NOT trigger sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30003.md states 'Classification: nit' and 'no sub-task created.' No subtask-30003.md file exists in the outputs directory.

assertion_results.text: The question comment about GET behavior (id 30004) is classified as question and does NOT trigger sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30004.md states 'Classification: question' and 'no sub-task created.' No subtask-30004.md file exists in the outputs directory.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description follows the task-description-template.md format: contains Repository, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, and Acceptance Criteria sections (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains sections: '## Repository' (line 1), '## Description' (line 4), '## Files to Modify' (line 7), '## Implementation Notes' (line 10), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 17). subtask-30002.md contains sections: '## Repository' (line 1), '## Description' (line 4), '## Files to Modify' (line 7), '## Implementation Notes' (line 10), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 17). Both sub-tasks contain all five required sections.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description includes a Target PR section with the PR URL https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744 (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md line 28-29: '## Target PR\nhttps://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744'. subtask-30002.md line 23-24: '## Target PR\nhttps://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744'.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description includes a Review Context section with the original review comment text (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md lines 31-36: '## Review Context' section contains the original comment text starting with 'The `soft_delete` method should run all three UPDATE statements inside a single database transaction...'. subtask-30002.md lines 26-36: '## Review Context' section contains the original comment text starting with 'The migration should also add an index on `deleted_at` for the sbom table...'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, creates sub-task descriptions, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only classification files (review-30001.md through review-30004.md), sub-task description files (subtask-30001.md, subtask-30002.md), and a report file (report.md). No code files (.rs, .toml, .sql, etc.) appear in the outputs. The sub-task files describe changes to be made but do not contain modified source code — they are task descriptions only.

assertion_results.text: The skill reads and processes all PR review comments before generating findings (constraint 1.10)
assertion_results.evidence: All four review comments (30001, 30002, 30003, 30004) have corresponding classification files (review-30001.md through review-30004.md). The report.md states '4 review comments classified: 2 code change requests (sub-tasks created), 1 nit, 1 question', confirming all four comments were processed. The report addresses each comment individually in the 'Summary of Issues Requiring Attention' section.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: The report.md contains no merge commands, no gh pr merge invocations, no references to merging the PR. The overall result is 'WARN' and the report identifies issues requiring attention. There is no indication in any output file that a merge was performed or attempted.

assertion_results.text: The report contains a Test Change Classification row with ADDITIVE — only new test files were added (tests/api/sbom_delete.rs is a new file)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 14: '| Test Change Classification | ADDITIVE | 1 new test file (`tests/api/sbom_delete.rs`) with 5 test functions; no modified or deleted test files |'. Also confirmed in the Test Quality Detail section line 72: '**Test Change Classification:** ADDITIVE -- new test file only, no modified or deleted test files'.
